calendar.matters:
Petition For Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Dec-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bobby Y. Lydon-Lam, Esq., via Zoom, for Lan H. Lee, petitioner.

Counsel confirms reviewing the Examiner's notes and offers advocacy for the subject petition. The court queries counsel as to the amount of money that the settlors had the year that the trust was created compared to the tax exemption available the same year. Counsel offers testimony regarding the court's query.

After additional discussion, the court acknowledges counsel's testimony and advises that it intends to take the matter under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Svahlin. Not Reported.
